summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of K Beats futuristic landing page with Claude 4.5 Sonnet chatbot integration. All major features working correctly including glassmorphism effects, particle animations, and AI chat functionality.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Intermittent AI error responses during conversation
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Error handled gracefully with fallback message

passed_tests: Chat message sending with Claude 4.5 Sonnet integration
Chat history retrieval and MongoDB storage
Hero section with glassmorphism effects and particle animations
Services section with 6 service cards and hover animations
Floating chatbot button and AI chat widget
Chat messages stored in MongoDB with session_id
